series_metadata.series_description: These files contain documentation prepared to substantiate proper departmental cost allocation plans of Federal Awards based on cash expenditures of the previous fiscal year activities and the projecting costs for the billing year, in accordance with Office of Management and Budget (OMB). These proposal records are submitted by the grantee annually.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: three years, provided Federal Audit has been conducted by Federal Government and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved ; Electronic: three years, provided Federal Audit has been conducted by Federal Government and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved
